summary: Pre-production deployment smoke test PASSED. All critical flows verified: auth (athlete/director/platform_admin), mission control, athlete programs, coaching stability, Gmail status, admin integrations (Gmail, Stripe, Resend, MongoDB all connected), Stripe checkout. Fixed KeyError bug in athlete_tasks.py. No hardcoded preview URLs found in API responses.

minor.issue: KeyError: 'flag_id' when coach_flags collection has records without flag_id field
minor.fix_applied: Added null check for flag_id in athlete_tasks.py line 69

critical_code_review_comments: Backend config.py: FRONTEND_URL properly configured from env, CORS origins correctly built
Backend admin_integrations.py: All integration statuses returned correctly (gmail, stripe, ai, resend, mongodb_prod)
Backend stripe_checkout.py: Checkout session creation working, returns Stripe checkout URL
Backend coaching_stability.py: Returns cached or on-demand scanned stability data
Frontend AdminIntegrationsPage.js: All integration cards display correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend JourneyPage.js: Coaching stability badge displays correctly with 'Stable' status
Gmail redirect_uri uses FRONTEND_URL from config, not hardcoded
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-production smoke test complete. All critical paths verified for Vercel/Railway deployment. Backend integrations all connected: Gmail (database config), Stripe (test mode), AI/LLM, Resend, MongoDB (capymatch-prod.63nymfu.mongodb.net with 55 collections). Coaching stability feature working with real DuckDuckGo + AI analysis. Fixed minor bug in athlete_tasks.py (KeyError on missing flag_id).

auth_athlete_login.details: Returns token, refresh_token, user with role=athlete

auth_refresh_token.details: Exchanges refresh_token for new token pair

admin_integrations.details: Returns all integration statuses (gmail, stripe, ai, resend, mongodb_prod)

gmail_connect_redirect.details: Redirect URI uses FRONTEND_URL, not hardcoded

frontend_login_page.details: Login form loads with email/password inputs

frontend_journey_page.details: Shows Stanford University with coaching stability badge

frontend_admin_integrations.details: Shows Gmail, Stripe, Resend, MongoDB cards

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked - all integrations are real (Gmail OAuth, Stripe test mode, Resend, MongoDB Atlas, Emergent LLM)
